name: black-tiger-web-app
description: Black Tiger web app built with Next.js
author: Samiullah

scripts.test:shop: node --test tests/shop-data.normalize.test.mjs && node tests/shop-api.contract.mjs && playwright test tests/e2e/shop.spec.js
scripts.test:plp: node --test tests/shop-data.normalize.test.mjs && node tests/plp-api.contract.mjs && playwright test tests/e2e/plp.spec.js
scripts.test:cart: node --test tests/cart-map.test.mjs tests/cart-errors.test.mjs && node tests/cart-api.contract.mjs && playwright test tests/e2e/cart.spec.js
scripts.test:auth: node --test tests/auth-redirect.test.mjs && node tests/auth-api.contract.mjs && playwright test tests/e2e/auth.spec.js
scripts.test:account: node --test tests/account-map.test.mjs && node tests/account-api.contract.mjs && playwright test tests/e2e/account.spec.js
scripts.test:checkout: node --test tests/checkout-map.test.mjs tests/cart-errors.test.mjs && node tests/checkout-api.contract.mjs && playwright test tests/e2e/checkout.spec.js
scripts.test:lists: node --test tests/lists-map.test.mjs && node tests/lists-api.contract.mjs && playwright test tests/e2e/lists.spec.js
scripts.test:catalog: npm run test:shop && npm run test:plp
